subject: Recommended Reading for Literature Review
body:
Dear Dr Smith,

I'm working on the literature review for my KV6003 project and I'm struggling to find enough quality sources on email classification using NLP. Could you recommend any key papers or textbooks I should be looking at?

I've already found a few through the library but I feel like I'm missing some foundational work.

Kind regards,
Olivia Hughes

subject: Extra Revision Sessions Before Exam?
body:

With the KV4006 exam approaching, I was wondering if there will be any additional revision sessions or drop-in clinics scheduled before the exam period? A few of us in the cohort were hoping for some extra support.

If there's nothing formal, would you be open to running a Q&A session during one of the remaining weeks?

Rebecca Lawrence
